title: Better Axes
description: Better Axes gives every axe a cleaner, sharper, and more detailed design. Lightweight, simple, and perfect for PvP or survival. Just better-looking axes.
body:
# Better Axes
This texture pack redesigns all Minecraft axes with cleaner shapes, sharper details, and smoother shading—perfect for PvP, survival, and content creators. Each axe has its own refined look while staying close to Minecraft’s original style, giving tools a more polished and modern feel without overdoing it.
- This pack is not based on any specific creator; all designs were made from scratch using my own style.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.5 – 1.20.6 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- No mods required. This pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
